text_description: active leak under kitchen sink, cabinet base wet, drip at p trap
damaged boards on rear exterior wall near window

audio_transcript: missing cover plate at outlet in garage, exposed wiring visible

text_description: efflorescence along lower foundation wall in basement corner
several missing shingles observed on the rear slope of the roof, visible from ground level
condensate drain line on air handler is clogged and water is pooling in the drip pan
large water stain on living room ceiling directly below second floor bathroom, stain is dry at time of inspection
double-tapped breaker observed in main electrical panel, two circuit wires connected to a single breaker terminal
horizontal crack observed in poured concrete foundation wall in basement, crack runs approximately 8 feet along the middle of the wall
dishwasher has standing water remaining in the bottom after completing a full wash cycle
soil grading at the rear of the home slopes toward the foundation, likely directing surface water toward the crawl space
pull-down attic stair hatch has no insulation cover, creating a significant thermal bypass in the ceiling
garage door opener does not auto-reverse when an obstruction is placed in the door path, safety reversal feature is not functioning
visible mold growth on basement walls and underside of floor joists, musty odor present throughout basement
mud tubes observed on foundation wall in crawl space, consistent with subterranean termite activity
